description.en: An exception raised for invalid gzip files. It inherits from OSError. EOFError and zlib.error can also be raised for invalid gzip files. Added in version 3.8.

excerpt.es: An exception raised for invalid gzip files. It inherits from OSError. EOFError and zlib.error can also be raised for invalid gzip files. Added in version 3.8.
